name: Gelato Fiasco
description: Gelato shop in Portland's Old Port offering rotating flavors of gelato made on-site with local ingredients.

evidence.detail: Consistently top-rated gelato destination in Portland reviews
Featured as premier gelato spot in local roundups

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Gelato Fiasco Portland ME gelato scoop cone photo
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Close-up of gelato scoops in a waffle cone with visible flavor swirls and toppings

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Gelato Fiasco Portland specific flavor closeup
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Single flavor gelato in cup showing texture and color

name: The Lobster Shack at Two Lights
description: Coastal seafood stand serving ice cream alongside lobster rolls with ocean views at Two Lights State Park area.

evidence.detail: Landmark status in Cape Elizabeth tourism coverage
Frequent mentions of ice cream with seafood orders

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Lobster Shack Two Lights ice cream cone photo
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Ice cream cone held with ocean or rocky coast visible in background

name: Smiling Hill Farm
description: Working dairy farm with on-site ice cream stand using milk from their own cows.

evidence.detail: Documented farm ice cream stand operations

photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Ice cream scoop in dish or cone from farm stand

name: Higgins Beach Market
description: Neighborhood market near Higgins Beach offering ice cream to beachgoers.
